meta.description: Site-level metadata shown in the sidebar header and page title.

avatar.description: Path or URL to a portrait image used in the sidebar.

bio.description: Free-form Markdown rendered on the dedicated About page.

projects.description: Ordered list of projects shown in the sidebar.

id.description: Unique slug used in URLs and as a React key.

description.description: Short paragraph shown below the project title in the sidebar when selected.

coverPhoto.description: ID of the photo to use as the sidebar thumbnail. Defaults to the first photo.

CanvasSettings.description: Per-project canvas configuration. All fields are optional.

background.description: CSS color for the canvas background.

LayoutAlgorithm.description: Controls how photos are algorithmically arranged on the canvas.

algorithm.description: scatter: organic random placement with slight rotations. grid: clean rows/columns with breathing room. spiral: Archimedean spiral from center. clusters: grouped by implicit proximity, small rotations within each cluster.

seed.description: Random seed so the layout is deterministic across renders. Change to get a different arrangement.

padding.description: Minimum gap in logical pixels between photo edges.

sizeVariance.description: How much photo widths vary relative to the base size. 0 = uniform, 1 = wide range. Only applies to scatter and clusters.

rotationRange.description: Max rotation in degrees applied to each photo (positive or negative). 0 disables rotation.

src.description: Path or URL to the image file.

aspectRatio.description: width / height. Used by the layout algorithm to allocate space before the image loads. If omitted, defaults to 1.5 (3:2 landscape) until the image reports its natural size.

FlipSide.description: Content shown on the back of the photo when clicked.

markdown.description: Free-form Markdown rendered on the back of the card. Supports headings, bold, italic, lists, and inline code.

background.description: CSS color for the flip-side background. Defaults to a dark tone complementary to the canvas.

textColor.description: CSS color for the rendered Markdown text.
